languages.text: {n}Ноги ваши неизбежно марают Патент, но каждый святотатственный шаг лишь разжигает в вас праведный гнев, укрепляя волю и веру — словно сам Бог-Император посылает священную ярость.{/n}

{n}Your boots inevitably soil the Warrant, yet each sacrilegious step only stokes righteous fury within you, strengthening your will and your faith, as if the God-Emperor Himself is sending forth His divine wrath.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ноги ваши неизбежно марают Патент, но каждый святотатственный шаг лишь разжигает в вас праведный гнев, укрепляя волю и веру — словно сам Бог-Император посылает священную ярость.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Your feet inevitably soil the Warrant, yet each sacrilegious step only stokes righteous fury within you, strengthening your will and your faith, as if the God-Emperor Himself is sending sacred rage.{/n}

{n}Your feet inevitably soil the Warrant, yet each sacrilegious step only stokes righteous fury within you, strengthening your will and your faith, as if the God-Emperor Himself is sending sacred rage.{/n}

{n}Your boots inevitably soil the Warrant, yet each sacrilegious step only stokes righteous fury within you, strengthening your will and your faith, as if the God-Emperor Himself is sending forth His divine wrath.{/n}

{n}Your boots inevitably soil the Warrant, yet each sacrilegious step only stokes righteous fury within you, strengthening your will and your faith, as if the God-Emperor Himself is sending forth His divine wrath.{/n}

{n}Your boots inevitably soil the Warrant, yet each sacrilegious step only stokes righteous fury within you, strengthening your will and your faith, as if the God-Emperor Himself is sending forth His divine wrath.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的靴子不可避免地踩脏了贸易授状，然而每踏出一步亵渎的脚印，都只会激起你内心正义的怒火，坚定你的意志与信仰，仿佛神皇正亲自降下祂的神怒。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your boots inevitably soil the Warrant, yet each sacrilegious step only stokes righteous fury within you, strengthening your will and your faith, as if the God-Emperor Himself is sending forth His divine wrath.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的靴子不可避免地踩脏了贸易授状，然而每踏出一步亵渎的脚印，都只会激起你内心正义的怒火，坚定你的意志与信仰，仿佛神皇正亲自降下祂的神怒。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tus botas manchan la Patente, como no podía ser de otra forma, pero cada sacrílego paso que das solo aviva la furia justiciera de tu interior, reforzando tu voluntad y tu fe como si el propio Dios Emperador te transmitiera Su cólera divina.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your boots inevitably soil the Warrant, yet each sacrilegious step only stokes righteous fury within you, strengthening your will and your faith, as if the God-Emperor Himself is sending forth His divine wrath.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tus botas manchan la Patente, como no podía ser de otra forma, pero cada sacrílego paso que das solo aviva la furia justiciera de tu interior, reforzando tu voluntad y tu fe como si el propio Dios Emperador te transmitiera Su cólera divina.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Inévitablement, vos bottes souillent la lettre, et chaque pas sacrilège alimente en vous une fureur sacrée, renforçant votre volonté et votre foi, comme si l'Empereur-Dieu lui-même vous emplissait de son courroux divin.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your boots inevitably soil the Warrant, yet each sacrilegious step only stokes righteous fury within you, strengthening your will and your faith, as if the God-Emperor Himself is sending forth His divine wrath.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Inévitablement, vos bottes souillent la lettre, et chaque pas sacrilège alimente en vous une fureur sacrée, renforçant votre volonté et votre foi, comme si l'Empereur-Dieu lui-même vous emplissait de son courroux divin.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Çizmelerin kaçınılmaz olarak Ruhsatname'yi kirletiyor. Ancak saygısızca atılan her adım, sanki bizzat Tanrı İmparator'un ilahi gazabını gönderiyormuş gibi içindeki haklı öfkeyi körüklüyor, iradeni ve inancını güçlendiriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your boots inevitably soil the Warrant, yet each sacrilegious step only stokes righteous fury within you, strengthening your will and your faith, as if the God-Emperor Himself is sending forth His divine wrath.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Çizmelerin kaçınılmaz olarak Ruhsatname'yi kirletiyor. Ancak saygısızca atılan her adım, sanki bizzat Tanrı İmparator'un ilahi gazabını gönderiyormuş gibi içindeki haklı öfkeyi körüklüyor, iradeni ve inancını güçlendiriyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Deine Stiefel beschmutzen unweigerlich den Handelsbrief, aber jeder deiner frevlerischen Schritte schürt nur deinen rechtschaffenen Zorn und stärkt deinen Willen und deinen Glauben, als würde der Gottimperator Selbst seinen heiligen Zorn entfesseln.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your boots inevitably soil the Warrant, yet each sacrilegious step only stokes righteous fury within you, strengthening your will and your faith, as if the God-Emperor Himself is sending forth His divine wrath.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Deine Stiefel beschmutzen unweigerlich den Handelsbrief, aber jeder deiner frevlerischen Schritte schürt nur deinen rechtschaffenen Zorn und stärkt deinen Willen und deinen Glauben, als würde der Gottimperator Selbst seinen heiligen Zorn entfesseln.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたのブーツは必然的にウォーレントを汚すだろうが、その神聖な踏みつけはあなたの怒りをさらに高め、あなたの意志と信仰を強める。まるで神皇帝自身が彼の神聖な怒りを放つかのようだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your boots inevitably soil the Warrant, yet each sacrilegious step only stokes righteous fury within you, strengthening your will and your faith, as if the God-Emperor Himself is sending forth His divine wrath.{/n}
